title: salix × kalmthoutensis
intro: Salix × kalmthoutensis, also known as Kalmthout willow, is a hybrid plant species that is a cross between Salix alba (white willow) and Salix fragilis (crack willow). It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties, which are attributed to the presence of salicin, a compound similar to aspirin. The health benefits of Salix × kalmthoutensis include pain relief, reduction of inflammation, and potential antiseptic properties, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Salix × kalmthoutensis is often used to prepare herbal teas, salves, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, including arthritis, fever, and skin conditions.
